mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.retreat_id, c.contract_url, c.contract_name, c.terminate_date, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, u.user_name AS create_name FROM lc_retreat_contract c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.create_by = u.user_id WHERE c.retreat_id = #{retreatId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.retreat_id, c.contract_no, c.contract_url, c.contract_name, c.terminate_date, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, u.user_name AS create_name FROM lc_retreat_contract c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.create_by = u.user_id WHERE c.retreat_id = #{retreatId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
